steps.title: Identify the navigation signal
steps.content: The phrase “by the sound” combined with “made his way” shows the Rat is using sound as a tool to direct his movement toward the tree.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: ”Steering” means directing one's course or path—precisely what the Rat does by following the sound through the darkness to reach the beech tree. The other options (withdrawing, presenting, instructing) either contradict the forward movement or describe actions unrelated to navigation. That matches choice D — D is correct.
